positive: A minimalist abstract scene of two interlocking crescent moons and stardust nebula forming a sophisticated celestial portrait. The design should feature deep indigo and ethereal gold colors, contrasted against a creamy off-white background, creating a striking, graphic silhouette. Use clean linework and geometric abstraction, suitable for a front-facing apparel print. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, conveying cosmic wonder and mystery. Highly detailed, vectorial, screen-printed style, perfect symmetry, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, copyright, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, messy, noisy, low detail, artifacts, ugly, extra limbs
